response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates exceptional breadth and depth of general software engineering experience (27 years) with entrepreneurial accomplishments, this principal-level role specifically requires demonstrated expertise in AI product strategy, machine learning, and thought leadership. The resume shows infrastructure and tooling work supporting AI systems but lacks evidence of AI/ML product development, recognized AI expertise, or the strategic advisory capability needed for a director-level AI strategy position.
strengths: 27 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems—significantly exceeding the 15-year requirement
Proven entrepreneurial initiative and platform-building skills through founding GISCollective, an open-source geospatial platform used globally
Full-stack technical capability with exposure to cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and emerging AI infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows)
concerns: No demonstrated machine learning, deep learning, or AI product development experience—critical gap for an AI Strategy role
Lacks recognition or thought leadership in AI space; no publications, widely-adopted AI products, or evidence of industry influence on AI innovation
No evidence of strategic customer advisory work or leading cloud platform strategy initiatives at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Limited AI/ML expertise and no demonstrated AI products
27 years of full-stack engineering experience and entrepreneurial track record
No evidence of strategic cloud platform leadership or customer advisory at director level
